papers.title: BELT:Bootstrapping Electroencephalography-to-Language Decoding and Zero-Shot Sentiment Classification by Natural Language Supervision

reasons: EEG is the central modality focused on brain-to-language translation.
Proposes a generic framework to bootstrap EEG representation learning using large-scale pretrained language models.
Demonstrates zero-shot generalization capabilities, a key characteristic of foundation models.
Aims to create semantically discriminative EEG representations for broad application across decoding tasks.
